focus: Slice 10: final coverage sweep of previously uncovered files

notes: Binds better-sqlite3 Database handle; driver type import is the primary coupling surface for all hybrid search SQL.
Queries sqlite_master for FTS5 virtual table existence; Turso lacks FTS5 so this check would always return false.
Standard SELECT on memory_index for BM25 scope resolution; standard SQL, Turso-compatible.
Delegates to FTS5 bm25() weighted scoring; Turso has no FTS5 — entire FTS channel must be reimplemented.
LIKE-based trigger phrase search with JOIN to active_memory_projection; standard SQL, Turso-compatible.
Direct query on sqlite-vec virtual table for MMR reranking embeddings; Turso lacks vec0/loadExtension — must be replaced.
Standard SELECT on memory_idempotency_receipts; Turso-compatible.
UPSERT with ON CONFLICT and datetime('now'); Turso supports upsert syntax — compatible.
Standard SELECT on memory_index; Turso-compatible.
UPDATE with datetime('now') on memory_index; Turso-compatible.
Standard UPDATE on memory_index; Turso-compatible.
Converts embeddings to binary format for sqlite-vec vec0 virtual table storage; Turso lacks vec0/loadExtension.
Pure in-memory scoring algorithm on already-retrieved results; no SQLite constructs — migration-neutral.
Pure string normalization pipeline; no SQLite constructs — migration-neutral.
Pure markdown chunking logic; no SQLite constructs — migration-neutral.
Reconciliation engine is driver-agnostic; StatediffTargetType enum references table names (memory_index, embedding_cache, fts, bm25) but module itself has no SQL — migration-neutral.
Uses better-sqlite3 prepare() to verify handle is closed; Turso driver must support equivalent probe or be shimmed.
Pure filesystem path resolution for DB directory; no SQLite constructs — migration-neutral.
Pure computation producing insert/upsert/replace/delete action descriptors — no direct SQLite coupling; action types are DB-agnostic. Migration-neutral write planner.
Write dispatcher via StatediffTargetSink.apply() — already async-ready; Turso migration moves actual SQL into sink implementations, not this module.
FTS5 existence check via sqlite_master — Turso lacks FTS5; this check would always return false, disabling the entire FTS channel.
Converts embeddings to Buffer for sqlite-vec storage format — Turso/vector-index replacement must handle identical binary serialization or provide compatible adapter.
BM25 scope resolution via standard SQL — Turso-compatible; but the BM25 lexical index (getIndex()) is in-memory, not SQLite-coupled.
Type-level dependency on better-sqlite3; Turso/libSQL has different type surface (e.g. no Statement generic, different Database interface).
Module-level better-sqlite3 Database handle stored as singleton; Turso client is async and has different connection lifecycle (HTTP/WebSocket vs in-process).
Checks sqlite_master for memory_fts FTS5 virtual table; Turso/libSQL lacks FTS5 — query will return empty or error.
Delegates to FTS5 bm25() ranking function; Turso/libSQL has no FTS5 — this entire search channel fails.
Produces Buffer for sqlite-vec vec0 virtual table storage; sqlite-vec extension not available in Turso/libSQL.
Type dependency on better-sqlite3 BetterSqlite3 namespace.
